description: Intent-only request: decompose meeting summaries and action-item follow-up instead of forcing a single label.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.
Summarize my meetings and follow up on action items.

processExpectations: The agent decomposes the request instead of forcing one label for the whole prompt.
The agent identifies meeting summarization as a bounded AI task or hybrid step.
The agent identifies action-item follow-up as underspecified and potentially agentic if the actions are not predefined.
The agent asks, or explicitly says the next step is to ask, what follow-up actions should be taken and under what rules.
